title: Air France-KLM Ramps Up Its SAF Offtake Agreement With TotalEnergies, Which Will Supply Up to 1.5 Million Tons of More Sustainable Aviation Fuel Over a 10-Year Period
content: TotalEnergies and Air France-KLM have signed an agreement for TotalEnergies to supply up to 1.5 million tons of more sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) to Air France-KLM Group airlines over a 10-year period, until 2035. This agreement marks one the largest SAF purchase contracts signed by Air France-KLM to date. In 2022 and 2023, Air France-KLM was the world's leading SAF user, representing 17% and 16% of total global production respectively. This contract builds on a memorandum of understanding (MoU) signed in 2022 for the supply of 800,000 tons of SAF.
author: Analysts Account
